data.body:
## Description

**What**: Parse --include-archived flag in ticket-list.sh alongside existing --format flag. When --include-archived is set, omit --exclude-archived from the reducer batch call (line 68). When not set, keep current behavior (pass --exclude-archived).

**Why**: GREEN phase — make Task 1's RED tests pass.

**Implementation approach**: Add flag variable include_archived=false before the options loop. Add case for --include-archived in the argument parsing. Build the batch command conditionally: if include_archived is true, omit --exclude-archived.

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-list.sh (add flag parsing, conditional batch call)
- .test-index (remove RED marker)

### TDD Requirement
Task 1's test_include_archived_flag_returns_all_tickets and test_default_excludes_archived turn GREEN.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ticket-list.sh help/usage mentions --include-archived
  Verify: head -20 plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-list.sh | grep -q 'include-archived'
- [ ] .test-index RED marker removed for ticket-list.sh
  Verify: ! grep -q 'ticket-list.sh.*\[test_include_archived' .test-index
